parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter on a search string.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Filter on one or multiple article types (a.k.a. additionalType). These are supported types:
artikel-nl, regel-nl, wetswijziging-nl, subsidie-nl, page-nl, video.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Filter on one or multiple subjects.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Paging offset filter. Default value is 0 when not specified.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Paging limit filter. Default value is 20 when not specified. Max value is 200.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description:
Sort order. Articles can be ordered by two attributes: dateModified and additionalType. The
following order tokens represent the order filtering of those two attributes in ascending and descending orders:
modified:desc, modified:asc, modified (same as modified:asc), type:desc, type:asc, type (same as type:asc). Example:
order=modified:desc,type:desc

parameters.description: Paging offset filter. Default value is 0 when not specified.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Paging limit filter. Default value is 20 when not specified. Max value is 200.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description:
Sort order. Articles can be ordered by two attributes: dateModified and additionalType. The
following order tokens represent the order filtering of those two attributes in ascending and descending orders:
modified:desc, modified:asc, modified (same as modified:asc), type:desc, type:asc, type (same as type:asc). Example:
order=modified:desc,type:desc

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of article. ID has a numerical value. Example: 274863

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of article. ID has a numerical value. Example: 274863

parameters.name: regions
parameters.description: Filter on one or multiple regions/provinces (case-insensitive). Examples: noord-holland, limburg.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description:
Filter on location (city) of event venues (case-insensitive). Location filter overrides regions filter when both are
specified while the location (city) is situated outside of the specified regions (provinces). Examples:
amsterdam, utrecht.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Filter on address of event venues.

parameters.name: postalCode
parameters.description: Filter on postal code of event venues.

parameters.name: subjects
parameters.description: Filter on one or multiple subjects (case-insensitive). Examples: bedrijf starten, personeel.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Filter on period. Supported values: comingweek, comingmonth, comingyear (default).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Paging offset filter. Default value is 0 when not specified.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Paging limit filter. Default value is 20 when not specified. Max value is 200.

get.summary: Get theme by ID (articles grouped by subject)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of theme. ID has a numerical value. Example: 270107.

get.summary: List all themes with their featured articles

additionalType.description:
Article type (a.k.a. additionalType). Article types include: artikel-nl, regel-nl, subsidie-nl,
wetswijziging-nl, video.

author.description: Article authors. Note: field naming of 'author' is singular, but author field contains an array of authors.

isPartOf.description: List of other articles that are related (referenced) to the same article.

ArticleContract.description: Represents the datacontract of an article.

additionalType.description:
Article type (a.k.a. additionalType). Article types include: artikel-nl, regel-nl, subsidie-nl,
wetswijziging-nl, video.

ArticlesContract.description: Represents the datacontract of a list of article summaries.

organizer.description: Event organizers. Note: field naming of 'organizer' is singular, but organizer field contains an array of arganizers.

EventContract.description: Represents the datacontract of an event.

EventVenue.description: Represents the location where an event takes place.

EventVenueSummary.description: Represents a summary of an event venue.

EventsContract.description: Represents the datacontract of a list of event summaries.

PagingInfo.description: Represents pagination data of a result list.

partType.description:
Part item type. (A part type describes the relation of a part item with its containting article). Part types include: further-info, parent,
answer, related, external, legislation, amendment.

additionalType.description: Article type (a.k.a. additionalType). Article types include: artikel-nl, regel-nl, subsidie-nl, wetswijziging-nl, video.

PartItem.description: Represents a related article that is referenced inside the .hasPart or .isPartOf field of an article.

SubsidieContract.description: Represents the datacontract of a subsidy.

SubsidieSummary.description: Represents a summary of a subsidy.

SubsidiesContract.description: Represents the datacontract of a list of subsidy summaries.

ThemeContract.description: Represents the datacontract of a theme.

ThemeSubjectsContract.description: Represents the datacontract of a subjecttheme.

ThemeSummaryWithFeaturedArticles.description: Represents a theme summary with featured articles.

ThemesContract.description: Represents the datacontract of a list of theme summaries.

ThemesWithFeaturedArticleContract.description: Represents a list of theme summaries with featured articles.
